race.comment: JADE SUNSET (12) thrown in the deep end in the heavy going with a struggling ninth over 1600m at Eagle Farm in Listed grade. Assess on the good second over the 1600m here two-back. Blinkers go on and has genuine winning prospects. DON'T TELL POLLY (8) got the gun run third-up when shedding her Maiden tag in good style over 1625m at Wyong. Well placed over this trip and can play a leading role again. THE BIG BLUE (4) got off the mark two-back, then a month between runs with a fading fourth over 1800m Randwick Kensington in BM72 class. Fitter now and likely to roll forward. Respect. MADE IN ITALY (13) solid effort last start when second up from a spell, beaten just a long neck into second over 1550m at Randwick Kensington. Key runner who can give this a shake.
